title: Buying Secondhand Online 网购二手
scene: 二手平台上买卖双方沟通

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.line: Hi, I am interested in your desk chair. Is it still available?
lines.trans: 你好，我对你的办公椅感兴趣。还在吗？

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.line: Yes, it is available. I bought it last year, but I am moving abroad so I need to sell it.
lines.trans: 还在。我去年买的，但我要出国了，所以得卖掉。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.line: Can you send me more photos? I want to see if there are any scratches or damage.
lines.trans: 能多发几张照片吗？我想看看有没有划痕或损坏。

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.line: Sure, I will upload them in the chat. There is a small scratch on the armrest, but nothing serious.
lines.trans: 当然，我发到聊天里。扶手上有个小划痕，但不严重。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.line: I saw the photos. The price is eighty dollars. Can you go down to sixty?
lines.trans: 我看到照片了。标价80美元。能降到60吗？

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.line: The lowest I can do is seventy. It is almost new and the original price was two hundred.
lines.trans: 最低70。它几乎全新，原价是200美元。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.line: Seventy works. Can you deliver it to my apartment? I live ten minutes away.
lines.trans: 70可以。你能送到我公寓吗？我住在十分钟路程外。

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.line: I can drop it off this Saturday morning. Cash or mobile payment is fine.
lines.trans: 我周六上午可以送过去。现金或手机支付都可以。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.line: Mobile payment is better. I will send you the address. See you on Saturday!
lines.trans: 手机支付更好。我把地址发给你。周六见！

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.line: See you then. I will clean it before I bring it over.
lines.trans: 到时候见。我会在送过去之前把它擦干净。
